items.title: Five Notre Dame Football Photos for a Friday: The Elusive Tight End
items.summary: Today is my oldest son’s birthday. He turns 15, and in the fall he will be a freshman on the football team. Over the last several years of playing the sport, we have often talked about which position would be best for him as a player on both sides of the ball. As a pitcher […]

items.title: Who was the worst Notre Dame Football coach of all-time?
items.summary: Notre Dame Football is currently blessed. The Fighting Irish are under the leadership of Marcus Freeman, and they are on the brink of being a national power like something we haven’t seen since Lou Holtz paced the sidelines at Notre Dame. It’s easy to view Freeman as someone who is cut from the same cloth […]

items.title: Notre Dame Lacrosse: Shawn Lyght is the first defensemen in history to win the Tewaaraton Award
items.summary: While the Notre Dame Men’s Lacrosse team came up short in the National Championship game to secure its third title in four years, this season will still go down in NCAA Lacrosse history. Notre Dame’s Shawn Lyght was named as the winner of the Tewaaraton Award for the nation’s best lacrosse player. It is the […]

items.title: Notre Dame and more college football schedule maneuvering
items.summary: The best triple option play of all-time might be the inside veer. I’m running it under the high sun. NOONER FOR THE WIN I frequently talk about my passion for a good nooner, and I believe that in certain cases, it is a necessity for some games on the Notre Dame football schedule. In 2026, […]

items.title: Are the Texas Longhorns too cowardly to play Notre Dame?
items.summary: Yes. More than likely, the Texas Longhorns are afraid to play Notre Dame in a college football game. While that’s definitely a funny statement, it’s also further proof that Texas has no freaking clue about how pretty much anything works. The Longhorns are convinced that it was the loss to Ohio State in week one […]

items.title: Notre Dame’s CJ Carr is that top tier quarterback we talked about
items.summary: A post holiday triple option with a slight delayed hangover never hurt anyone. CREME DE LA CREME OF THE STRONG ARMS A lot of the offseason talk surrounding the Notre Dame Football program and its projections for the 2026 season has centered around CJ Carr. items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting: Blue-Chip EDGE Jackson Vaughn commits to the Irish
items.summary: Yes, the Notre Dame recruiting machine is running strong. On Tuesday during an announcement ceremony on 247’s YouTube channel, 4-Star defensive end Jackson Vaughn gave his public commitment to Marcus Freeman and the 2027 Notre Dame football recruiting class. The 6’3” 225 pound EDGE from Bergen Catholic in New Jersey, chose the Irish over his […]

items.title: TRIPLE THREAT: Will Black, Bryce Young, and Khary Adams
items.summary: Everyone loves to do a player countdown for Notre Dame as we face toward the college football season, but in all fairness, the offseason is much shorter than you think. It’s really only two months in the grand scheme of things, and there will be much more to talk about in the middle of July […]
